titleStmt.title: Kīḻūr, Vīraṭṭāṉeśvara temple, time of Rājendra Cōḻa, year 5

summary.p: It records a gift of four mās (given with boundaries) land by the inhabitants of Tirukkōvalūr at the request of the śivabrahmaṇa Kauśikaṉ Mallaṉ Amutaṉ. The land was meant to carry out several services during the Tiruvātirai festival in the month of Mārkaḻi, such as listening to the Tiruvempāvai and giving sacred water, food offerings, and giving sacred cloths.

revisionDesc.change: Creation of the file on the repository

div.p:
tirumakaḷ maruviya ceṅkōl vēn=taṉtaṉ muṉṉōṉ cēṉai pinnṉṉatuvāka munnṉṉetirenṟ' iraṭṭapāṭi Ēḻarai Ilakkamum koṇṭu kollā purattu jayastampam nāṭṭi munnāṇai ta
virttu tannāṇai celutti Etirppeṟā teṇṭicai nikaḻa-p paṟaiyatu kaṟaṅka-p perāṟṟaṅkarai-k kōppattu van=tetir poeruta Āhava mallanañci-p puṟakkiṭṭoṭa Avanāṉaiyu kutiraiyum
peṇṭir paṇṭāramuṅ ko
ṇṭu vijai Avipeṣakam
paṇṇi viīrasiṅāsana
ttu viṟṟiruntaruḷinṉa

kō-p-pa
rakēsari panmarānṉa Uṭaiyā
r śrī rājentra-devaṟku yā
ṇṭu Añcāvatu
jaṉaṉāta-vaḷanāṭṭu-k kuṟukkai-k-kūṟṟattu putuppeṟūr Ūrōmm Ik-kūṟṟattu-t tirukkōvalūr-t tiruviīraṭṭāṉam uṭaiyār Āti-caṇtheśura devaṟku nāṅkaḷ viṟṟu-k kuṭutta nilam āvatu

Eṅkaḷuūr-k kaḷiyak kaḻani kiḻi
ṉattil teṟkitu nila Orumāvum Itaṉ vaṭakkitu nilam muṉṟumāvu Ākattaṭi Iraṇṭinā nila ṉālumāvum

viṟpataṟku kiīḻpāṟkellai naraciṅka Īśvaram uṭaiyār nilattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai tirunan=tavāṉa-p puṟattukku vaṭakku
m melpāṟkellai vāykkālukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai It-tevar Āti caṇṭesvaraṟku It-tevar śivabrāhamaṇan kauśikanṉ mallanṉ amutanṉ viṇṇappattāl meṟpaṭi Ūrōm viṟṟu-k-kuṭutta nilam
taṭi Oṉṟināl nila muṉṟu-māvukku teṟkum

iv-icain=ta perunāṉkellaiyuḷ Akappaṭṭa nilam nāṉkumāvumm Emmilicain=ta vilai-dravyamum iṟai dravyamumaṟa-k-koṇṭu vilaiyaṟa viṟṟōm in-nilattāl van=tanirkkaraiyum veṭṭi veti
ṉaiyumaṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭituṅ kāttūṭṭa-k kaṭavomānṉōm putupeṟūr Ūrōm

In-nilam koṇṭu mārkaḻi-t tiruvātirai-nāḷ ōlakkamāy tiruvempāvai keṭṭaruḷi ditīrtta prasādittu perun=tiru Amutu ceytaruḷi ti
ruvuṇāḻiyārkkum peṇ
ṭukaḷukkum niman=takāṟṟku pa
ricaṭṭa prasādañ ceytaru
ḷa ceyvittān tirukkōva
lūr kaṇiyar nārāyaṇanṉ A
raṅkanṉāna cempiyanṉ ceti vi
ṣaiya muūven=tavēḷān

Using koṇṭu this land, Cempiyaṉ Ceti-viṣaiya-Mūvēntavēḷāṉ, alias Nārāyaṇaṉ Araṅkaṉ, the astrologer kaṇiyar of Tirukkōvalūr ordered literally "caused to be made" that during the festival of Tiruvātirai in Mārkaḻi the Tiruvempāvai was to be heard keṭṭaruḷi, consecrated water tīrtta was distributed prasādittu, a great big food-offering perun tiru amutu was given ceytaruḷi, and sacred cloths paricaṭṭam were offered ceytaruḷa to temple servants nimantakār, the women peṇṭukaḷ, and the priests from the innermost shrine tiruvuṇṇāḻiyar.

The verses of the meykkīrtti dedicated to Rājendra Cōḻa do not occur here in the expected sequence and the passage combines elements belonging to different versions, which makes the metrical articulation highly speculative. Therefore, the present edition does not impose a verse division and leaves the meykkīrtti as a running prose text.
Digital edition of SII 41.12 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
